description:
Configure a custom 1D local velocity model named 'GYM_LOCAL' for the LocSAT locator in SeisComP.

1. Create the LocSAT table files for P and S waves exactly at `~/seiscomp/share/locsat/tables/GYM_LOCAL.P` and `~/seiscomp/share/locsat/tables/GYM_LOCAL.S`.
2. Both files must contain the following depth-velocity structure (standard ASCII format):
